title: Building safe Payment Infrastructure for the autonomous economy — Steve Kaliski, Stripe
summary: Stripe presents infrastructure for secure autonomous agent spending, addressing credential transmission and business discoverability to agents. The talk covers guardrails for safe autonomous transactions and infrastructure needs for agent-driven purchasing.
